probes.procedure: Estimate the same adjusted contrast for a synthetic outcome generated before exposure and causally unaffected by it.
probes.pass_condition: Absolute standardized effect remains below the fixture tolerance.
probes.kill_condition: Negative-control effect exceeds the critical fixture threshold.

probes.threat: Result depends on one party-family taxonomy.
probes.procedure: Recompute outcomes under two predeclared synthetic taxonomy variants.
probes.pass_condition: Direction and material conclusion remain stable.
probes.kill_condition: Conclusion reverses under a plausible accepted taxonomy.
